description:
You are acting as a release-manager preparing today’s deployment reports.  

1. A raw application log already exists at  
   /home/user/project/release-2024-04-15.log  

2. Create a new directory  
   /home/user/project/deploy  

3. From the raw log, extract ONLY those lines that satisfy ALL of the following rules:  
   • The line contains the literal word “ERROR” (all-caps).  
   • Immediately after “ERROR” there is a single space and then a service name that matches the regular-expression  ^app-(01|02)$  
     (i.e. the service name is app-01 or app-02 – no other numbers).  
   • Preserve each matching line exactly as it appears in the source file (no leading/trailing whitespace added or removed).  
   • Keep the original order.

   Write the extracted lines to  
   /home/user/project/deploy/error_summary_2024-04-15.log

   Output format requirement that the automated grader will check:
   • File must end with a single UNIX newline (\n).  
   • No blank lines are allowed anywhere in the file.  
   • There must be exactly three lines in the file.  
   • Each line must contain the original ISO-8601 timestamp followed by a single space, the word “ERROR”, another single space, the service name, another single space, and the original message text.

4. Produce a one-line text file that contains ONLY the total count (an integer with no extra spaces or newline characters before it) of the extracted ERROR lines.  
   Path: /home/user/project/deploy/error_count_2024-04-15.txt  
   The file must contain precisely a single digit “3” followed by a UNIX newline.

You can accomplish the whole task with about three or four standard shell commands (mkdir, grep/egrep, wc, etc.).  
When finished, you should have exactly two new files inside /home/user/project/deploy. The grader will read those files to verify correctness.
truth:
Pre-existing file (already present when the agent starts):

Path: /home/user/project/release-2024-04-15.log  
Contents (each line terminated with \n):

2024-04-15T08:00:01Z INFO  app-01 Starting deployment  
2024-04-15T08:00:05Z ERROR app-01 Failed to fetch artifact  
2024-04-15T08:00:10Z WARN  app-02 Slow response from repository  
2024-04-15T08:00:12Z ERROR app-02 Missing environment variable  
2024-04-15T08:00:15Z INFO  app-03 Deployment completed  
2024-04-15T08:00:18Z ERROR app-03 Timeout contacting service  
2024-04-15T08:00:20Z ERROR app-02 Port already in use  
2024-04-15T08:00:25Z INFO  app-01 Rollback initiated  

(8 lines total; mixed INFO, WARN, ERROR entries.)

Files that must exist after successful agent execution:

1. /home/user/project/deploy/error_summary_2024-04-15.log  
Exact contents (with terminating \n):

2024-04-15T08:00:05Z ERROR app-01 Failed to fetch artifact  
2024-04-15T08:00:12Z ERROR app-02 Missing environment variable  
2024-04-15T08:00:20Z ERROR app-02 Port already in use  

2. /home/user/project/deploy/error_count_2024-04-15.txt  
Exact contents (with terminating \n):

3  

The test harness will confirm:  
• Directory /home/user/project/deploy exists.  
• The two files exist with exact byte contents shown above.  
• No extra files are created inside /home/user/project/deploy.  
• Permissions are default user-writable (agent does not need to adjust them).
